title: lappula polymorpha
intro: Lappula polymorpha, also known as delphinium or sticky gilia, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lappula polymorpha include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Lappula polymorpha can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
